purpose: Replay-only contract for testing external Hugging Face image-to-image models against Twin Card source images before any production integration.
safetyRules: Do not use live participant photos with external providers unless consent and legal/commercial review explicitly allow it.
Do not add this provider to the production funnel until model license, privacy posture, retention behavior, and commercial rights are approved.
Use the same three replay source images for every candidate so marketing can compare model quality objectively.
Store external-provider outputs under twin-card-replay only; never overwrite participant generated/avatar or print artifacts.
defaultPromptSuffix: Transform the reference photo into a clean, polished 2D wellness avatar while preserving the same person's visible identity, face shape, hair, skin tone, eyewear, pose, framing, and natural expression. Keep it healthcare-friendly, premium, simple background, no text, no logos.
defaultNegativePrompt: different person, changed identity, changed face, changed hairstyle, different hair color, removed glasses, added glasses, different age, glam beauty filter, plastic skin, text, logo, watermark, distorted face, extra limbs

candidateModels.reason: Best first FLUX-family image-editing candidate from Hugging Face for preserving a source image while applying a new visual direction.
Strong image-edit candidate for turning a source photo into a stylized avatar while retaining visible structure.
Newer Qwen image-edit variant worth comparing if hosted inference is available.
FLUX-family image-to-image candidate to compare against FLUX.1 Kontext if available.
